## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link the issue with `Closes #N`. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (red-green TDD visible in commit history)
- [ ] `bun run lint`, `bun run format:check`, `bun run typecheck`, `bun test:coverage` all pass locally
- [ ] CI is green on the PR branch
- [ ] Coverage meets the SPEC §13 floor (80% line overall; 90% on tight-gate modules once they exist)
- [ ] Documentation / SPEC / CLAUDE.md updated if behavior or contracts changed
- [ ] Copyright header present on every new source file
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, or API keys in code, comments, or transcripts
- [ ] REV review (https://gitlab.com/postgres-ai/rev/) posted with no BLOCKING findings (SOC2 findings are non-blocking for this project)

## Testing evidence

<!--
Paste command output demonstrating the change works end-to-end. Examples:

- `bun test` summary (tests count + pass/fail)
- `bun run samospec <subcommand>` output
- Screenshot or terminal capture for UX-visible changes

Keep it short but concrete — reviewers should not have to guess whether
the change actually runs.
-->
